sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n229" key="a)ga1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγα-</orth>, intensive prefix, <sense id="n229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very,</tr_> as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγα-κλεής,</foreign> etc., cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄγαν.</foreign> (Prob. for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mˆga,</tr_> reduced form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέγα.</foreign>)</sense> </entryFree>
